overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour. The journey transitions from commercial streets through a highway underpass to a major intersection with a traffic stop under a 'Crestmont' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with ground-level shops and palm trees

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial district passing storefronts and pedestrians on sidewalks

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structure with large windows and signage
tall palm trees lining the street
overhead traffic signal structure with multiple lights
ground-level retail storefronts with awnings and displays

segments.scene_description: Driving through a sunlit commercial district with palm trees lining the street. Low-rise buildings with storefronts pass by on both sides while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The vehicle maintains a steady speed through the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway ramp descending into underpass system

events.description: entering tunnel/underpass area, natural sunlight fades to artificial shadow
exiting tunnel back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: descending highway ramp and passing through short underpass tunnel

entered.detail: steep concrete walls lining the descending ramp
massive futuristic skyscraper visible in the distance
overhead concrete structure of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends a highway ramp into an underpass system, transitioning from open streets to a semi-enclosed concrete corridor. Massive corporate towers loom in the background as the vehicle passes briefly through a shadowed tunnel before emerging back into sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with overhead signage and billboards

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light under Crestmont sign
traffic light turns green, vehicle accelerates through intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, stopping at red light, then proceeding through crosswalk as light changes

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in front of the vehicle at the crosswalk

entered.detail: large overhead sign with 'Crestmont' text marking the intersection
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade
multi-level highway structure running parallel to the road
highway signage indicating directions and exits

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major highway intersection marked by a prominent 'Crestmont' overhead sign. After stopping at a red light, the vehicle waits as pedestrians cross, then proceeds through the intersection as the light turns green, passing large digital billboards and elevated highway structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic city that transitions from a sunlit commercial district into a dense urban highway network. It begins by gliding past palm trees and low-rise storefronts along a multi-lane road bustling with pedestrians. As the vehicle descends a highway ramp, the open street shifts into a semi-enclosed concrete underpass where massive corporate towers loom overhead and the light briefly dims within a shadowed tunnel. The scene then opens back into the sunlight as the camera approaches a major intersection marked by a prominent Crestmont overhead sign. After a brief stop at a red light, the vehicle finally proceeds through the intersection, passing under elevated highway structures and large digital billboards.
